problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Enzymatic. Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
